title: Opted-out users receive billing notices
requirement: REQ-NOTIFY-4: Users opted out of non-essential billing reminders must not receive them.
seededViolation: A billing reminder is sent without reading the opt-out preference.
whyItMatters: The product disregards a user's communication choice.

expectedFindings.title: Billing reminder ignores opt-out preference
expectedFindings.description: The sender delivers a non-essential reminder without a preference check.

distractors.reasonNotAnIssue: The sender must not send to a missing user.
